sentences.target: Die Bürgerin wartet vor dem Rathaus.

translations.de: Die Bürgerin wartet vor dem Rathaus.
translations.en: The citizen is waiting outside city hall.
translations.es: La ciudadana espera fuera del ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: La citoyenne attend devant la mairie.
translations.it: La cittadina aspetta fuori dal municipio.
translations.ko: 여성 시민이 시청 밖에서 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位女市民在市政厅外等候。
translations.yue: 有位女市民喺市政大樓外面等緊。
translations.pt: A cidadã espera do lado de fora da prefeitura.
translations.tr: Kadın vatandaş belediye binasının dışında bekliyor.
translations.vi: Nữ công dân đang đợi bên ngoài tòa thị chính.
translations.nl: De burger wacht buiten het stadhuis.
translations.hu: Az állampolgár a városháza előtt vár.
translations.hi: महिला नागरिक नगर पालिका भवन के बाहर इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.el: Η πολίτισσα περιμένει έξω από το δημαρχείο.
translations.id: Warga perempuan menunggu di luar balai kota.
translations.ja: 女性の市民が市役所の外で待っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Feminine noun, singular nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; agrees with the subject.
Preposition governing the dative here (static location).
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Rathaus' as object of 'vor'.
Neuter noun, singular dative; object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Ich helfe der Bürgerin mit dem Formular.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ ˈbʏʁɡəʁɪn mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich helfe der Bürgerin mit dem Formular.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ ˈbʏʁɡəʁɪn mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯/
translations.en: I’m helping the citizen with the form.
translations.es: Estoy ayudando a la ciudadana a rellenar el formulario.
translations.fr: J’aide la citoyenne à remplir le formulaire.
translations.it: Sto aiutando la cittadina a compilare il modulo.
translations.ko: 나는 여성 시민이 양식을 작성하는 것을 도와주고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在帮这位女市民填写表格。
translations.yue: 我喺度幫呢位女市民填表。
translations.pt: Estou ajudando a cidadã a preencher o formulário.
translations.he: אני עוזר לאזרחית למלא את הטופס.
translations.tr: Kadın vatandaşa formu doldurmada yardımcı oluyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang giúp nữ công dân điền mẫu đơn.
translations.ar: أنا أساعد المواطنة في تعبئة الاستمارة.
translations.nl: Ik help de burger het formulier invullen.
translations.hu: Segítek az állampolgárnak kitölteni a nyomtatványt.
translations.hi: मैं महिला नागरिक की फ़ॉर्म भरने में मदद कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βοηθάω την πολίτισσα να συμπληρώσει τη φόρμα.
translations.nb: Jeg hjelper borgeren med å fylle ut skjemaet.
translations.id: Saya membantu warga perempuan mengisi formulir.
translations.sv: Jag hjälper medborgaren att fylla i blanketten.
translations.ro: O ajut pe cetățeana să completeze formularul.
translations.da: Jeg hjælper borgeren med at udfylde formularen.
translations.ja: 私は女性の市民が書類を記入するのを手伝っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; selects a dative object.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Bürgerin' (indirect object).
Feminine noun, singular dative; indirect object licensed by 'helfen'.
Preposition governing the dative; marks accompaniment/instrument.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Formular'.
Neuter noun, singular dative; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Die junge Bürgerin zeigt ihren Ausweis.

translations.de: Die junge Bürgerin zeigt ihren Ausweis.
translations.en: The young citizen shows her ID.
translations.es: La joven ciudadana muestra su identificación.
translations.fr: La jeune citoyenne montre sa pièce d’identité.
translations.it: La giovane cittadina mostra il suo documento d’identità.
translations.zh-Hans: 年轻的女市民出示她的身份证件。
translations.yue: 年輕嘅女市民出示佢嘅身分證件。
translations.ru: Молодая гражданка показывает своё удостоверение личности.
translations.pt: A jovem cidadã mostra seu documento de identidade.
translations.he: האזרחית הצעירה מציגה את תעודת הזהות שלה.
translations.vi: Nữ công dân trẻ cho xem giấy tờ tùy thân của mình.
translations.nl: De jonge burger laat haar identiteitsbewijs zien.
translations.uk: Молода громадянка показує своє посвідчення особи.
translations.hu: A fiatal állampolgár megmutatja a személyi igazolványát.
translations.hi: युवती नागरिक अपना पहचान पत्र दिखाती है.
translations.pl: Młoda obywatelka pokazuje swój dowód tożsamości.
translations.el: Η νεαρή πολίτισσα δείχνει την ταυτότητά της.
translations.nb: Den unge borgeren viser legitimasjonen sin.
translations.sv: Den unga medborgaren visar sin legitimation.
translations.ro: Tânăra cetățeană își arată actul de identitate.
translations.cs: Mladá občanka ukazuje svůj průkaz totožnosti.
translations.da: Den unge borger viser sit id-kort.
translations.ja: 若い女性の市民が身分証を見せる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject.
Attributive adjective, nominative feminine singular (weak inflection -e); modifies 'Bürgerin'.
Feminine noun, singular nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, accusative masculine singular agreeing with 'Ausweis'; possessor contextually 3rd person singular.
Masculine noun, singular accusative; direct object of 'zeigt'.

sentences.target: Eine Bürgerin ruft beim Rathaus an.

translations.de: Eine Bürgerin ruft beim Rathaus an.
translations.en: A citizen is calling city hall.
translations.ko: 한 여성 시민이 시청에 전화하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 一位女市民正在给市政厅打电话。
translations.yue: 一位女市民打電話去市政大樓。
translations.pt: Uma cidadã liga para a prefeitura.
translations.vi: Một nữ công dân đang gọi đến tòa thị chính.
translations.hi: एक महिला नागरिक नगर पालिका को फ़ोन कर रही है.
translations.id: Seorang warga perempuan menelepon balai kota.
translations.ja: 女性の市民が市役所に電話している。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject.
Feminine noun, singular nominative; head of the subject NP.

Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'anrufen' with 'ruft'.
